title: Post-implementation review + SYSTEM EVALUATION #3 — Clotho slice 6
note: ADVISORY evaluation anchored to commit-verified facts. The slice that proved the escalation path end-to-end.
run: clotho slice 6 (escalation 774d5ef -> Eye ruling executed 1596767 -> agent delivery 86793a3 -> integrated ea6a15d; PR #126)
what_was_built: test-flagship.mjs (522) + expected-flagship.json (548; 26 hand-audited expectations, all eight groups) + generator + published 76-fact review set; PLUS the Eye-ruled reviewed data: docs/ledgers/clotho-obligation-ledger.jsonl (hash-chained, real clause resolution) + docs/runs/clotho-flagship-evidence/ (real executed run) + the anticipated LEDGER_SOURCES/RUN_SOURCES inventory change with tests
verification_outcome: clotho npm test 14/14 (flagship in-suite: two real weaves per run, ~25s/~19s under 120s ceilings); why.gaps EMPTY for the flagship target which now touches all seven kinds; verify-contracts 207/207; mutation checks discriminating; entry ritual 4/4 GRANTED before work
what_worked: THE ESCALATION PATH, END TO END: the builder proved unsatisfiability from a real weave, refused to fabricate or weaken, committed NOTHING, and escalated with precise root causes — then resumed with full context after the ruling and delivered green. CHANGE-PROTOCOL's promise held under a real contradiction

the reviewed-data ruling stayed honest: run evidence that IS a run (the runner executes the symbol), an obligation ledger resolving a REAL contract clause by exact section hash, and the inventory comment's anticipated 'reviewed change with tests' fulfilled literally
agent resume-with-context (SendMessage) preserved the five-group audit across the escalation pause — zero rework
fail-closed mechanisms fired in ordinary use and were RIGHT: D20/D28 no-replace refused a leftover destination; test-all's unlisted guard caught a silent no-op wiring edit
defects_found_during: none in slice-5/6 code. Process: the integrator's inline node replace printed success unconditionally on a no-match (caught by the unlisted guard) — rule: never print success a mechanism did not verify; prefer the Edit tool for source edits
commit 1596767's message says verify-contracts 208/208; the true count was 207/207 (corrected here — commit messages are logs and must not overstate)
process_mistakes_preserved: repeated the PIPESTATUS-vs-$? misread once more during diagnosis before re-checking — the recorded rule works only when applied

probe scripts written against guessed record/API shapes (verifyLedger bytes-vs-path, from/to vs from_locator) cost three iterations — rule: read the signature and one real record BEFORE writing a probe

redundancy: generate-expectations.mjs and generate-obligation-ledger.mjs both re-derive section hashes via splitMarkdownSections — acceptable (evidence tooling, not shipped surface); do not promote to util without a shipped consumer
review-set.json (1,396 lines) is committed run evidence; future flagship regenerations replace it rather than accrete versions

process_dependencies.slice_7_needs: 6's flagship (reproduction re-derives from committed bytes; d8 self-weave exclusion flips via run.mjs + test-flagship)
process_dependencies.conclusion: slice 7 is the final slice; its two deliverables (reproduction evidence; documentation/README render) are disjoint-writer parallelizable as evaluated in #2

concurrency_opportunities_via_merkle_dag: slice 7: agent-R (docs/runs/clotho-self-weave/ reproduction run + d8 flip evidence) and agent-D (clotho/memory/README.md renderer + drift gate, the OPEN-QUESTIONS candidate) — disjoint files, merge after green oracles
flagship suite cost is now ~45s of real weaving per clotho npm test — acceptable; revisit only if CI minutes matter

optimizations_for_future_runs.optimization: when an implementation is mid-flight and an escalation pauses it, resume the SAME agent with SendMessage rather than respawning — audits and context carry over
read the target signature + one real datum before authoring any probe script
slice 7 parallel split (reproduction | renderer) per evaluations #2/#3
